About Capital Wealth Advisors

Serving Utah families since 2010 with personalized retirement planning and fiduciary financial advice.

Michael Stevens Photo

Michael Stevens, IAR

Investment Adviser Representative & Founder

Michael Stevens didn't start his career planning to become a financial advisor. Originally on a pre-med track, his path changed dramatically when his father passed away during his college years. This life-changing event shifted his perspective and ultimately led him to the world of finance, where he discovered his passion for helping families navigate complex financial decisions.

After completing his BS in Business Management at Utah Valley University, Michael earned his Series 66 certification and began building what would become Capital Wealth Advisors in 2010. His commitment to the fiduciary standard means he is legally obligated to act in his clients' best interests at all times - no conflicts, no commissions, just honest advice.

Michael holds a California insurance license (#0G96805) and serves on the board of Junior Achievement of Utah, where he helps educate young people about financial literacy and entrepreneurship. This community involvement reflects his belief that financial education should be accessible to everyone.

Series 66 Certified Fiduciary Standard California Licensed #0G96805 JA Utah Board Member UVU Business Graduate

Our Team

Experienced professionals dedicated to your financial success.

Michael Stevens

Founder & Lead Advisor

Founded 2010, originally pre-med, shifted to finance after father's passing. BS Business Management, Utah Valley University. Series 66 certified, fiduciary standard. California insurance license #0G96805. Board member Junior Achievement of Utah.

Retirement Planning Tax Strategies Estate Planning

Brent Thompson

Advisor

Brent brings extensive experience in comprehensive financial planning and portfolio management. He works closely with Michael to ensure every client receives personalized attention and strategic guidance tailored to their unique retirement goals.

Portfolio Management Financial Planning Client Relations

Our Mission

To provide comprehensive retirement planning that gives our clients confidence and peace of mind for their financial future.

Fiduciary Commitment

We are legally bound to act in your best interest at all times. No sales quotas, no product commissions - just honest, objective advice.

Comprehensive Planning

Our holistic approach addresses all aspects of your retirement: income planning, tax optimization, estate planning, and risk management.

Utah Expertise

Deep knowledge of Utah tax laws, local regulations, and the unique financial planning needs of Utah families.

Our Core Values

1

Integrity First

Every recommendation we make is in your best interest, period. Our fiduciary standard isn't just legal - it's moral.

2

Education Focus

We believe informed clients make better decisions. We take time to explain strategies and ensure you understand your options.

3

Long-term Relationships

We're not here for quick transactions. We build lasting relationships that span decades, adapting as your needs change.

4

Proactive Service

We stay ahead of changes in tax law, regulations, and market conditions to keep your plan optimized.

Why Families Choose Capital Wealth Advisors

Specialization in Retirement

Unlike generalist advisors, we focus exclusively on retirement income planning and tax optimization for families approaching or in retirement.

Our Expertise Includes:

  • Tax-efficient withdrawal strategies
  • Social Security optimization
  • Medicare and IRMAA planning
  • Estate and legacy planning
  • Federal employee benefits
500+ Families Served
$500M+ Assets Under Guidance
15+ Years Experience

Community Involvement

Junior Achievement of Utah

Michael serves on the board of Junior Achievement of Utah, helping educate young people about financial literacy, entrepreneurship, and workforce readiness. This involvement reflects our commitment to improving financial education in our community.

Through JA Utah, we've helped teach financial literacy to hundreds of students, believing that early education creates stronger financial futures for Utah families.

Financial Literacy Youth Education Community Service

As Heard On Utah Radio

Michael regularly shares retirement planning insights and answers listener questions on local Utah radio programs.

Financial Planning Insights

Tune in to hear practical retirement planning advice, market commentary, and answers to common financial questions from Utah families.

Radio Guest Utah Media
